zh.lifeSummary: 當Maurice de Berkeley 4th Baron Berkeley於1330年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊時，他的父親Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Coston37歲，母親Margaret Mortimer26歲。他於1348年8月與Elizabeth le Despenser Baroness Berkeley在英國格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1368年6月8日在他的家鄉享年38歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托 凱德拉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maurice de Berkeley 4th Baron Berkeley于1330年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Coston37岁，母亲Margaret Mortimer26岁。他于1348年8月与Elizabeth le Despenser Baroness Berkeley在英国格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1368年6月8日在他的家乡享年38岁，埋葬在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Berkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named, such as Berkeley in Gloucestershire, named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scottish Barclay .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of   Berkowitz  .

variants.name: Barclay
meanings: Scottish: habitational name of English origin, from any of several places so called, such as Berkley in Somerset or Berkeley in Gloucestershire, both named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The surname was brought to Scotland from southwestern England in the 12th century; Walter de Berchelai or Berkelai was Chamberlain of Scotland in 1165. It was long assumed that they were from the family that held Berkeley Castle in Gloucestershire, but the historian G. W. S. Barrow (1973, The Kingdom of the Scots) adduced evidence that they are more probably from Berkley in Somerset.

variants.name: Berkley
meanings: English: variant of   Berkeley  . Compare Scottish   Barclay  .

nameMeanings.name: Maurice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Late Latin name Mauricius, a derivative of Maurus (a byname meaning ‘Moor’, i.e. ‘dark, swarthy’), borne by, among others, an early Byzantine emperor ( c.539–602 ). It was introduced to Britain by the Normans and was popular in the Middle English period, but was not widely adopted by the nobility and became rare in the 17th century. Between the mid-19th century and the 1940s, it was moderately popular but has since faded again. See also Morris .

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Maurice de Berkeley 4th Baron Berkeley was born in 1330, in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Coston, was 37 and his mother, Margaret Mortimer, was 26. He married Elizabeth le Despenser Baroness Berkeley in August 1348, in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 8 June 1368, in his hometown, at the age of 38, and was buried in Bristol Cathedral, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maurice de Berkeley 4th Baron Berkeley est né en 1330, à Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Coston, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Margaret Mortimer, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth le Despenser Baroness Berkeley en août 1348, à Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 8 juin 1368, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à Bristol Cathedral, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Bristol Cathedral, Gloucestershire, Engl: Bristol Cathedral, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Maurice de Berkeley 4th Baron Berkeley 1330 in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Coston 37 und seine Mutter Margaret Mortimer 26. Er hat im August 1348 in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England Elizabeth le Despenser Baroness Berkeley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 8. Juni 1368 im Alter von 38 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Bristol Cathedral, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maurice de Berkeley 4th Baron Berkeley è nato il nel 1330 nel Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Coston, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Mortimer, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth le Despenser Baroness Berkeley nel agosto 1348, nel Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 8 giugno 1368, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolto a Bristol Cathedral, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Maurice de Berkeley 4th Baron Berkeleyが1330年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアバーケリーで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Costonは37歳，母Margaret Mortimerは26歳であった。1348年8月にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアバーケリーでElizabeth le Despenser Baroness Berkeleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1368年6月8日に故郷で38歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアブリストル カスエドラルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Maurice de Berkeley 4th Baron Berkeley(이)가 1330년 영국 그루스스터실르 버켈리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Coston(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Mortimer(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1348년 8월 영국 그루스스터실르 버켈리에서 Elizabeth le Despenser Baroness Berkeley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1368년 6월 8일 그의 고향에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 브리스톨 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maurice de Berkeley 4th Baron Berkeley nasceu em 1330, em Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Coston, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Mortimer, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth le Despenser Baroness Berkeley em agosto de 1348, em Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de junho de 1368, em sua cidade natal, com 38 anos, e foi sepultado em Bristol Cathedral, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Bristol Cathedral, Gloucestershire, Engl: Bristol Cathedral, Gloucestershire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maurice de Berkeley 4th Baron Berkeley родился в 1330 г. в местности биркели, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Coston было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Mortimer, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth le Despenser Baroness Berkeley август 1348 г. в местности биркели, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 8 июня 1368 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности бристол кэтедраль, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Elizabeth le Despenser Baroness Berkeley en agosto de 1348, en Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 8 de junio de 1368, en su pueblo, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultado en Bristol Cathedral, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
